MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Perdue, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by Clifford Gatewood.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marvin Jablonsky is present.
Attorney Barbara Lam appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 22, 2019 is vacated. (501)
